author: y4rr
content: Follow-up from Sprint C.7 (#626). GpuBackend methods without MSL implementations: neg_f32/f64, abs_f32/f64, exp_f32/f64, log_f32/f64, sqrt_f32/f64, pow_f32/f64, fill_f32/f64, scale_f32/f64, clamp_f32/f64. Each should be a single-thread-per-element MSL kernel in src/kernels/elementwise_unary_f32.metal. Requires Apple Silicon CI to validate.
